libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime tests of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 on JDK 25, ensure the generated test build applies runtime system properties equivalent to: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Do not make this conditional only on libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; 5.0.1 still pulls Netty 4.2.x.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative; the exact failing path may still require metadata changes in addition to these runtime properties.
If generated tests exercise HTTPS, HTTP/2, proxies, or DNS-specific behavior, additional local test setup may be needed, but normal WebClient coverage does not require external services.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; tests can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server. However, 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final, and the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already documents that Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe-access runtime properties for JDK 25 native runs.
